category_sources: source_facts.description says it recovers files from headers and footers; official SourceForge homepage identifies Foremost as a forensic file recovery tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is foremost; official SourceForge homepage uses Foremost.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge homepage is the best official documentation surface found for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive point to SourceForge distribution, but no official source-control repository URL is provided.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists foremost; source_facts.description and official homepage describe header/footer based forensic recovery.
